result:
All 484 assertions pass. Summary of bugs fixed across the 13 modules:

**Auto-applied from beagle-repair (oracle-verified specfix queue):**
- `catalog.rkt:27` тАФ `product-margin` had `cost - price` swapped тЖТ `price - cost`
- `shipping.rkt:44` тАФ `carrier-total-cost` used `(carrier-id c)` тЖТ `(carrier-base-rate c)`
- `shipping.rkt:68` тАФ `zone-surcharge` used `(+ cost pct)` тЖТ `(* cost pct)`
- `shipping.rkt:210` тАФ `shipping-cost-for-order` passed `"pending"` тЖТ `order-id`
- `customers.rkt:30-32` тАФ `tier-discount-pct` had gold/bronze values swapped (5/15)
- `inventory.rkt:112` тАФ `reorder-needed` comparator flipped (`>` тЖТ `<`)

**Found via cascade analysis + runtime errors:**
- `billing.rkt:41` тАФ `(cust/customer-id)` missing argument
- `billing.rkt:49` тАФ `invoice-order-id` тЖТ `invoice-customer-id` in `invoices-for-customer`
- `analytics.rkt:121` тАФ `orders-in-period` missing `orders` argument
- `notifications.rkt:51-57` тАФ `create-notification` missing `reference-id` field
- `orders.rkt:43` тАФ `calculate-tax` had spurious `(* 2 ...)`
- `orders.rkt:49` тАФ `calculate-total` used `+` for discount тЖТ `-`
- `orders.rkt:55` тАФ `customer-discount-pct` passed `customer-id` тЖТ `customer-tier`
- `procurement.rkt:33` тАФ `poline-total` used `+` тЖТ `*` (quantity ├Ч unit-cost)
- `procurement.rkt:49` тАФ `lines-for-product` used `supplierid-value` тЖТ `productid-value`
- `promotions.rkt:43` тАФ `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` тЖТ `campaign-start-date`
- `promotions.rkt:117` тАФ `coupon-discount-amount` divided by 10 тЖТ 100
- `promotions.rkt:164` тАФ `customer-eligible?` passed `customer-id` тЖТ `customer-tier`
- `employees.rkt:27` тАФ `find-employee-by-id` matched on `hire-date` тЖТ `id`
- `employees.rkt:65` тАФ `line-commission` used `+` тЖТ `*` (rate ├Ч amount / 100)
- `employees.rkt:81` тАФ `total-commission` passed `(employee-name o)` тЖТ `employee-id`
- `audit.rkt:48` тАФ `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` тЖТ `order-id`
- `audit.rkt:55` тАФ `audit-shipment` entity-id was status string тЖТ `shipment-id`
- `audit.rkt:98-99` тАФ `entries-in-period` second comparator `>=` тЖТ `<=`

Final result: **484 passed, 0 failed**.
